name: Read Pinecone DB
description: Read Vector Embeddings from Pinecone db
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input

fields.name: topK
fields.title: Top K
fields.description: Number of nearest neighbor vectors to retrieve per query based on similarity score. Higher values return more results but may increase query latency.

fields.name: pineconeConnection
fields.title: Select Pinecone Connection
fields.description: Select the configured Pinecone connection containing API credentials, environment, and access settings required to execute vector queries.

fields.name: pineconeIndexName
fields.title: Pinecone Index Name
fields.description: Name of the Pinecone index to query. The index must exist and be compatible with the embedding dimensions used in the input data.

fields.name: indexNameSpace
fields.title: Index Namespace
fields.description: Optional namespace within the Pinecone index used to logically partition vectors. Useful for isolating datasets such as environments, tenants, or domains.

fields.name: userQueryCol
fields.title: User Query Column
fields.description: Column containing the raw user query text. Typically used when embeddings are generated dynamically from text-based queries.

fields.name: queryEmbeddingCol
fields.title: Query Embedding Column
fields.description: Column containing precomputed vector embeddings used directly for similarity search against the Pinecone index.
